name: Build Fix & Environment Setup
description: Create .env.example with all Firebase, Stripe, Groq, and app configuration variables. Fix next.config.ts with Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy header for Google OAuth. Resolve any TypeScript errors blocking npm run build.

name: Migration Flow from Structured
description: Build components/onboarding/MigrationFlow.tsx to ask users in onboarding if coming from Structured. Provide specific import guide, highlight 5 Senseday advantages, and integrate with ImportModal. Plan 7-day email sequence template.

name: Sound & Micro-feedback System
description: Build components/polish/SoundSystem.tsx with configurable sounds for: complete task, start block, snooze, achievement. Add silent mode by time range, haptic feedback on mobile, and volume control in settings. Integrate with Zustand store.

name: Landing Page SEO & Competitive Positioning
description: Create app/[locale]/landing/page.tsx with hero messaging 'The Structured alternative that works on Android'. Build feature comparison table (Senseday vs Structured), CTA for signup, and SEO optimization for keywords: 'structured android alternative', 'structured app web', 'task scheduler ADHD'.

name: Final Polish & Deploy Preparation
description: Verify all 6 i18n message files (pt-BR, en, es, fr, de, it) have consistent keys. Fix missing translation keys. Confirm PWA icons exist in public/icons/. Add structured data JSON-LD for SEO. Run npm run build and verify zero errors. Complete final testing checklist.
